description: Hierarchy / nested engines (§51.0.Q). A <engine for=PlayMode> is declared inside the outer engine's <Playing> composite state-child. On outer entry into .Playing the inner engine initializes at its initial= (.Exploring) and mounts (its markup renders). The inner engine has full engine semantics: a #fight click drives the inner Exploring -> Battle transition independently of the outer, which stays .Playing. Both auto-derived cells (@appMode, @playMode) are live and in-scope while the outer is in the composite.
rationale: §51.0.Q.1 the inner engine has full engine semantics and its lifecycle is coupled to the outer composite state-child (init + mount on outer entry); §51.0.F an inner-variable write validates against the inner state-child's rule=. Exploring rule=.Battle admits .Battle.
